DeliveredScope: Shared portable Compose core for SQL Server 2019, 2022, and 2025
Independent per-version Compose profiles and default host ports
Separate Docker and Podman resource-limit overrides
Runtime health check that executes a SQL query
Generic run, scope, owner, runtime, and SQL-version labels
Separate data, transaction-log, backup, and runtime bind contracts
Static Docker-based validation of both effective Compose models
OpenScope: Read-only runtime, port, resource, path, and image Preflight
Lifecycle execution and generated local state
ExternalEvidenceRequired: Native x86-64 Linux Docker Compose execution
Native x86-64 Linux Podman Compose execution
